commands.review_summary:
The PR changes agent tool-loop detection so the global circuit breaker counts repeated no-progress outcomes across the recent session history instead of only the current tool signature, with detector and before-tool-call wrapper tests.

PR surface: Source +41, Tests +205. Total +246 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.6.8 compare the global threshold against a per-tool/args no-progress streak, while the wrapper calls this detector from shared session history before every tool call.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer approval of the stricter session-global blocking semantics and normal merge checks, not an autonomous repair.
